source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the diagram, points $X$, $Y$ and $Z$ are on the sides of $\triangle UVW$, as shown. Line segments $UY$, $VZ$ and $WX$ intersect at $P$. Point $Y$ is on $VW$ such that $VY:YW=4:3$. If $\triangle PYW$ has an area of 30 and $\triangle PZW$ has an area of 35, determine the area of $\triangle UXP$. <image1>
